name: Ada_Modbus.Energy.Grid_Control

documentation.description:
Ada_Modbus.Energy.Grid_Control - Â§14a Power Limitation
Copyright (c) 2026 Florian Fischer
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

Implements power limitation control as required by Â§14a EnWG (Germany).
Grid operators can reduce power consumption of controllable devices
(heat pumps, EV chargers, batteries) during grid congestion.

Typical use: Energy Management System (EMS) receives Â§14a signals
and translates them to Modbus commands for connected devices.
